data.name: Security Guard Sex - Episode 5
data.detailed_description:
A visual novel series with animations about a guy working as a security guard. In this episode, he observes on the monitor displaying the bar area a mysterious woman mixing drinks, instead of the regular bartender.

GAME DESCRIPTION

Tanya and Lexi are two best friends who decided to spend the evening at a bar.
Cindy, the cute bartender, spoiled them with free drinks and shots, leaving the three of them quite tipsy.
When Cindy stepped away for a moment, Lexi, feeling adventurous, climbed behind the bar and helped herself to even more free alcohol.
Jeff, the vigilant security guard, kept a watchful eye on the scene through the security camera feed until he considered it was time to intervene.
Where did Cindy disappear with Tanya, and how did Lexi react when she was caught in the act?
Play our game to find out!

FEATURES

- HD renders and animations
- Video and image gallery

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 2 GHz Dual Core
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Graphics card supporting DirectX 9.0c
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any
